seoTitle: Plano ISD Calendar 2027-2028: Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: Plano ISD 2027-2028 calendar with Aug 11 first day, May 24 last day, fall break, Thanksgiving, winter break, spring break, PDF and ICS.

calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Plano ISD in 2027-2028?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Plano ISD is Wednesday, August 11, 2027. A staff work day on September 7 immediately follows Labor Day, extending the opening weekend to four consecutive days off.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Plano ISD in 2027-2028?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school for Plano ISD is Wednesday, May 24, 2028. The school year runs from August through May, covering 171 instructional days.

calendarFaqs.q: When is fall break 2027-2028 for Plano ISD?
calendarFaqs.a: Fall break for Plano ISD runs October 11–15, 2027 — a full week off. Students return October 18. As in previous years, most neighboring North Texas districts including Dallas ISD remain in session that week.

calendarFaqs.q: When is spring break 2027-2028 for Plano ISD?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring break for Plano ISD runs March 13–17, 2028 — two days earlier than the March 15–19 window in 2026–2027. A staff day follows on March 20. Good Friday (April 14) and Easter Monday (April 17) are both school holidays, creating a four-day weekend in mid-April.

calendarFaqs.q: When is winter break 2027-2028 for Plano ISD?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter break for Plano ISD runs December 20, 2027–January 4, 2028 (16 days). Staff days fall on January 3–4; second semester begins Wednesday, January 5, 2028.

yearNumbers.label: Labor Day Extended
yearNumbers.detail: Sep 7 is a Staff Work Day immediately after Labor Day, giving families Saturday through Tuesday off — a longer opening weekend than 2026–2027.

yearNumbers.label: Easter Monday Added
yearNumbers.detail: Easter Monday joins Good Friday (Apr 14) as a school holiday — a four-day Easter weekend that did not exist in 2026–2027.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Break Earlier
yearNumbers.detail: Spring Break shifts from Mar 15–19 to Mar 13–17 vs 2026–2027.

events.name: No School (Staff Work Day / Presidents' Day)

calendarNotes: Plano ISD begins the 2027–2028 school year on August 11, 2027, and the year ends May 24, 2028. Labor Day (September 6) is a school holiday; September 7 adds a Staff Work Day immediately after, extending what would otherwise be a three-day Labor Day weekend to four consecutive days off — Saturday through Tuesday. Unlike many neighboring North Texas districts that take only a long weekend, PISD's Fall Break runs the full week of October 11–15, with students returning October 18. Thanksgiving Break covers November 22–26; the first two days are Professional Learning Trade Days, extending the closure to a full five-day week rather than Thursday–Friday only. Winter Break runs December 20 through January 2, with January 3–4 as Staff Days and January 5 as the first day of second semester. Martin Luther King Jr. Day (January 17) is observed; Spring Break runs March 13–17 and typically aligns with other major North Texas districts, concentrating demand at DFW International Airport that week, with a Staff Day following on March 20. Good Friday (April 14) and Easter Monday (April 17) are both school holidays, creating a four-day weekend in mid-April that many families use for regional trips before the final weeks of school. For most PISD households, October's week-long Fall Break and April's Good Friday–Easter Monday stretch are the two periods most likely to require advance planning.
